english_text: Even a worm will turn
A picture is worth a thousand words
Don't count your chickens before they hatch
The early bird catches the worm
Birds of a feather flock together
Actions speak louder than words
No pain no gain
Rome wasn't built in a day
Slow and steady wins the race
A stitch in time saves nine
The grass is always greener
Too many cooks spoil the broth
Every cloud has a silver lining
You reap what you sow
Strike while the iron is hot
When in Rome do as Romans do
Don't judge a book by its cover
A rolling stone gathers no moss
Blood is thicker than water
Better late than never
korean_text: 안 하는 것보다 늦게라도 하는 게 낫다
romanization: an haneun geotboda neutgerado haneun ge natda

english_text: After rain comes sunshine
Seeing is believing
Knowledge is power
Practice makes perfect
Patience is a virtue
korean_text: 참을 인 세 번이면 살인도 면한다
romanization: chameul in se beonimyeon sarindo myeonhanda

english_text: Haste makes waste
An eye for an eye
Every dog has its day
Necessity is the mother of invention
Honesty is the best policy
All that glitters is not gold
Empty vessels make the most noise
Two heads are better than one
Where there's a will there's a way
Don't put all eggs in one basket
korean_text: 한 곳에 모든 것을 걸지 마라
romanization: han gose modeun geoseul geolji mara

english_text: Speech is silver silence is gold
Even monkeys fall from trees
A friend in need is a friend indeed
Look before you leap
Time and tide wait for no man
Kill two birds with one stone
Out of sight out of mind
Ignorance is bliss
The pot calls the kettle black
korean_text: 똥 묻은 개가 겨 묻은 개 나무란다
romanization: ttong mudeun gaega gyeo mudeun gae namuranda

english_text: Walls have ears
korean_text: 낮말은 새가 듣고 밤말은 쥐가 듣는다
romanization: nanmareun saega deutgo bammareun jwiga deutneunda

english_text: Don't cry over spilled milk
Old habits die hard
Like father like son
The pen is mightier than the sword
Heaven helps those who help themselves
No news is good news
Better safe than sorry
Love is blind
Time heals all wounds
When it rains it pours
Every journey begins with a single step
The truth will set you free
A leopard can't change its spots
Good things come to those who wait
Health is wealth
